{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20647_1
|class_id=20647
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=collection@20647_2
|fame=18
|art=32
|fth=18
|civ=11
|tech=11
|ss1=Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail DEF + 2<br>Epochbough: T30/30
|ss2=Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail DEF + 4<br>Epochbough: T30/30
|ss3=Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail DEF + 6<br>Epochbough: T30/30
|ss4=Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail DEF + 6<br>Epochbough: T30/30
|ss7=Per tier up for Epochbough, Snail DEF + 6<br>Epochbough: T30/30<br> (Awakened)
}}
